creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Boca Grande, Florida, needs to be on your radar for your next Florida vacation spot!

This is a great spot for a day trip or weekend getaway! 

Best things to do:

Check out the Gasparilla Inn and Club. It’s SUPER expensive to stay there, but it’s really cool to visit. 

For food go to The Pink Elephant or Newlin’s Gourmet. 

For ice cream go to The Pink Pony. 

Go to the beach and check out the lighthouse and the lighthouse museum. 

Also not in the video, visit the Johan Fust Community Library. You won’t be disappointed. 

#bocagrande #thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #islandsflorida

transcription.text: This is the most underrated beach town in Florida. And if you haven't been yet, you need to put it on your bucket list for your next Florida vacation spot. Welcome to Boca Grande located on Gasparilla Island on Florida's southwest coast, about two hours south of Tampa. Boca Grande has gorgeous beaches with white sand and clear blue water. Of course, the clarity of the water totally depends on the weather. So keep that in mind. Also, every time I go here, I see dolphins and manatees. There's an adorable downtown area to check out with great shops and cafes. Definitely visit the Gasparilla Inn and Club. If like me, you can't afford to stay here, it's okay. The quintessential old Florida charm will be sure to wow you anyway. My favorite restaurant on the island is the Pink Elephant. I love the pink decor here and they have excellent food. They also put these cute pink elephant charms on all of the drinks and it's so charming. Tucker Carlson has been spotted here, so say hi if you're a fan or don't if you're not. I also love Newland's Gourmet for their lobster rolls. Trust me, they're delicious. The owners are from Maine. A local favorite for ice cream is the Pink Pony, so stop there if you're craving something sweet. The Gasparilla Island Lighthouse is cool to check out, as is the Port Boca Grande Lighthouse Museum. Send this to a friend you would want to visit here with.
